channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Files for What Could be Largest IPO in History
item.description: Space Exploration Technologies, widely known as SpaceX, has filed for an initial public offering in

item.title: Tesla Model Y becomes first-ever car to reach legendary milestone
item.description: The Tesla Model Y became the first-ever car to reach a legendary Norwegian milestone, surpassing 100,000 new registrations after gaining a reputation as one of the most popular vehicles in the country and the world. As of May 20, Norwegian authorities have registered 100,224 units of the electric...

item.title: SpaceX Finally Filed and the S-1? Well, She’s a Lot
item.description: 308 pages of rockets, brain chips, $60 billion in liabilities, and a CEO who the company admits doesn't actually work there full time. Welcome to the most Elon IPO ever.

item.title: Forget Tesla for Retirees: Here Are 3 Value-Driven Automotive Stalwarts to Buy Right Now
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is once again sucking up financial oxygen, with Reddit’s wallstreetbets crowd posting sentiment scores as high as 88 (Very Bullish) on robotaxi, Optimus, and China-deal chatter. Tesla closed at $404.11 on May 19, 2026, against a trailing P/E of 373 and a forward P/E of 208, w...

item.title: SpaceX's Historic IPO: 5 Things You Need to Know
item.description: SpaceX will be the largest IPO in history. Stock Strategist Andrew Rocco explains what you need to know.

item.title: Genesis AI Expands Executive Team Across Legal and Operations with Former X and Tesla Leaders
item.description: Genesis AI, a global full-stack robotics company, today announced the appointments of two senior leaders as the company rapidly expands its talent pool and accelerates toward the introduction of its first general-purpose robot. Damien Kieran, who was formerly Chief Legal and Privacy Officer at Sa...

item.title: Inside SpaceX’s IPO Filing: Musk’s Control, xAI Losses, and Anthropic’s Massive AI Deal
item.description: SpaceX long-awaited IPO filing arrived Wednesday afternoon, offering investors their first detailed look at Elon Musk’s rocket and AI empire. SpaceX is going after what it describes as a $28.5 trillion addressable market “to build the systems and technologies necessary to make life multiplanetar...

item.title: SpaceX Is Quietly Trading at a Price That Would Make It 23x Bigger Than Facebook’s IPO
item.description: Somewhere between a thought experiment and a margin call, SpaceX has a price. On Hyperliquid, a decentralized derivatives venue, a synthetic contract called SPCX-USD recently changed hands around $203. Plug that price into the company’s share count and the implied valuation lands at roughly $2.4 ...

item.title: Twelve Zeros and One Musk: The Trillionaire Era Officially Begins.
item.description: Investors are in a new age of commercial space activity—and a new era of personal wealth. Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, already the world’s richest person, is now the world’s first trillionaire. On Wednesday, his rocket company, SpaceX, released its initial public offering registration stateme...

item.title: SpaceX IPO Filing Shows There Is No Finalized Terafab Deal With Tesla, Intel
item.description: SpaceX's latest filing shows new details about the agreements with Tesla and Intel, its two partners in the Terafab AI chip factory.

item.title: Tesla’s $2 Billion xAI Bet Just Got Folded Into SpaceX: The Hidden Story Behind the IPO
item.description: Here is the part of the SpaceX IPO story most coverage glossed over: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) wrote a $2 billion check to xAI in January 2026, and weeks later that check effectively cleared into SpaceX. The $2 billion that quietly changed addresses According to the SpaceX S-1, in January 2026, Tesla e...

item.title: Tesla Brings Full Self-Driving to China After Delays
item.description: Tesla's China launch comes as rivals expand their own assisted-driving systems.

item.title: Tesla Revenue From Musk Firms Nears $890M
item.description: Filings show growing financial links across Elon Musk's companies.

item.title: SpaceX's Long-Awaited IPO Is Here and It Could Make Musk a Trillionaire
item.description: Ticker SPCX will trade on Nasdaq with Musk retaining 85.1% of voting power

item.title: Tesla CFO Cashes Out $1.3 Million as TSLA Swings on FSD China Bets
item.description: Tesla CFO Offloads Stock While Investors Focus on Robotaxi and China

item.title: SpaceX reveals what Anthropic will pay for massive compute deal
item.description: SpaceX has disclosed the full financial details of its groundbreaking agreement with Anthropic, confirming that the AI company will pay $1.25 billion per month for dedicated high-performance computing resources. The revelation came through SpaceX’s latest securities filing in preparation for its ...

item.title: Tesla’s Stock Price Problem Refuses To Go Away
item.description: In the shadow of the massive SpaceX IPO, the stock of Elon Musk’s other big company is struggling. SpaceX could debut with a $2 trillion market cap as it raises $80 billion. It will need the money.

item.title: Tesla Faces Sharp Court Criticism Over Safety Lawsuit
item.description: Australian judge questions company's handling of class action case

item.title: Xiaomi’s new YU7 undercuts Tesla Model Y by $4,350 with 50 km more range
item.description: Xiaomi launched a new entry-level YU7 “Standard Edition” today priced at RMB 233,500 (~$32,400) — undercutting the Tesla Model Y by RMB 30,000 ($4,350) while delivering 643 km of range versus the Model Y’s 593 km. CEO Lei Jun admitted onstage that the original YU7’s pricing was “not competitive e...

item.title: SpaceX IPO plans include unusually large voting share for Elon Musk
item.description: SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) has officially filed for its initial public offering (IPO). Elon Musk's company is reportedly expected to raise $80 billion for a $2 trillion valuation. Yahoo Finance Technology Editor Dan Howley and Morning Brief host Julie Hyman take a deeper dive into the company's numbers an...

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Is Up After the SpaceX IPO Filing
item.description: Tesla stock rose early Thursday after SpaceX filed its IPO registration statement, fueling speculation about a megamerger between the two companies as their ties and overlap deepen. The move comes after the Wednesday evening release of SpaceX’s IPO filings. Elon Musk’s rocket company plans to ra...

item.title: Wall Street is About to Fund the First City on Mars. Here are the Craziest Details from the SpaceX S-1.
item.description: Imagine looking at your retirement account and seeing that your money is helping build a city on Mars. That scenario is no longer science fiction. SpaceX has officially filed its S-1 paperwork to go public, opening its doors to Wall Street and retail investors alike.

item.title: Tesla's $1 Trillion Question
Tesla Confirms FSD Supervised Available In China. The Stock Is Rising.
item.description: Tesla Full Self-Driving Supervised is available in China, a much-needed win in the huge EV market. Tesla stock rose slightly.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Oil Prices Top $100; Nvidia Wavers, Walmart Falls, SpaceX Files For Huge IPO
item.description: Futures fell as oil prices rebounded: Nvidia stock wavered after strong earning. Elon Musk's SpaceX released its IPO filing.

item.title: Stick With Nvidia or Chase SpaceX. The Answer Is Clear.
item.description: Fed meeting minutes show officials won’t rule out rate hikes, Target’s turnaround is underway, OpenAI prepping IPO filing, and more news to start your day.

item.title: Factbox-IPO-bound SpaceX's board is stacked with Musk empire loyalists
item.description: Ehrenp ent Tesla SpaceX reviewed his Tesla ties reis Director investor before ​determining he met Nasdaq since and independence standards. February director Expected to ‌chair SpaceX's 2026 Compensation and Nominating Committee post-IPO. Randy Independ Co-found Served as a SpaceX board observer G...

item.title: Following Trump-Xi Talks, Elon Musk's Tesla Launches Full Self-Driving In China After Years Of Uncertainty
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) has finally rolled out its Full Self-Driving (FSD) service in China following President Donald Trump‘s visit to China and meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Tesla Rolls Out FSD In China In a post on X on Wednesday, Tesla’s official handle posted a list of countrie...

item.title: Update: SpaceX Files for US IPO, Reports Wider Q1 Loss
item.description: (Updates with the offering's underwriters in the sixth paragraph) Space Exploration Technologies

item.title: Tesla Says FSD Is Finally Live In China, But Leaves Drivers Guessing On Rollout
item.description: After years of delays, Tesla confirmed that its driving assistance system is now available in China. Nobody can find it, though.

item.title: Prediction: Tesla Stock Could Go Parabolic After June 12. Here's Why.
item.description: The electric vehicle giant's stock is down by around 7% so far this year.

item.title: SpaceX unveils plans for blockbuster market debut that could push Elon Musk toward trillionaire status
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX has disclosed plans to launch a public listing in the US, opening the door for investors to trade shares of the aerospace company on the stock market. The company builds rockets, operates the Starlink satellite internet network, and also controls Musk’s controversial artificial...

item.title: SpaceX just filed for the IPO everyone was waiting for
item.description: SpaceX publicly filed its S-1 registration statement with the Securities and Exchange Commission on May 20, 2026, making its financial details available to the public for the first time ahead of what could be the largest IPO in history. An S-1 is the formal document a company must submit to the S...

item.title: SpaceX targets record flotation that could make Musk a trillionaire
item.description: Elon Musk has revealed plans for a stock market flotation of SpaceX that looks set to raise a record sum and could make him the world's first trillionaire. A prospectus for the upcoming initial public offering (IPO) says it is aimed at providing funding to put people on the moon and Mars as human...

item.title: Oracle Exec Sues Tesla Over Full Self Driving Promises And Wins $10,600
item.description: Class action lawsuits against Tesla have been running for a while based on the claims and promises Elon Musk made about Tesla Full Self Driving (FSD). Basically, people who spent a lot of money expecting Full Self Driving to work within a reasonable period of time are arguing that they ... [con...

item.title: SpaceX Reveals $1 Billion Bitcoin Holdings Ahead Of Historic IPO — Here's How Much The Elon Musk-Led Company Paid For Its Coins
item.description: SpaceX, the space exploration company led by Elon Musk, disclosed in its IPO filing on Wednesday that it holds more than $1 billion in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) on its balance sheet. More Details About BTC’s Reserves The company disclosed 18,712 BTC on hand as of March 31, recognized at a fair value ...

item.title: The Problem With Tesla’s NON-Automatic Windshield Wipers
item.description: Steve Hanley wrote an article this morning about Tesla’s dysfunctional, wacky automatic windshield wipers, among other things. We happened to have a conversation earlier in the morning about them, but I didn’t realize the extent of his crisis in the pouring Florida rain, and I also didn’t share t...

item.title: SpaceX S-1 reveals Tesla’s Terafab deal is far from done
item.description: SpaceX filed its S-1 with the SEC today ahead of its blockbuster IPO, and buried in the 308-page document is a sobering reality check on the Tesla (TSLA) collaborations that Elon Musk has been hyping for months. The legal language in SpaceX’s own filing reveals that both Terafab and Macrohard — t...

item.title: SpaceX reveals Musk company links, from Cybertrucks and jets to stock investments
item.description: SpaceX's IPO filing revealed extensive commercial and financial ties among Elon Musk's companies ranging from Cybertruck purchases and shared private jets to stock investments, showing how deeply intertwined his business ‌empire has become ahead of what could become the largest IPO in history. Wh...

item.title: Epic Fail! “Hold My Beer” Cybertruck Escapade Goes Wrong In Spectacular Fashion
item.description: A driver in Texas decided to test "Wade Mode" in his Tesla Cybertruck. He wound up getting arrested for his trouble. The post Epic Fail!

item.title: Musk Is In Total Control of SpaceX. The IPO Filing Has Finally Come.
item.description: The S-1 IPO registration statement for Elon Musk’s rocket company SpaceX arrived late Wednesday afternoon. Investors can download it here. SpaceX is going after what it describes as a $28.5 trillion addressable market “to build the systems and technologies necessary to make life multiplanetary, t...

item.title: The 'Elon Musk Effect' Could Send SpaceX Stock Into Wild Swings After IPO Even If Starlink Makes 'Billions' In Profit, Warns Expert
item.description: As SpaceX gears up for its IPO in June, an expert has voiced concerns about potential trading volatility amid the influence of founder and top boss Elon Musk. University of Florida finance professor Jay Ritter told Forbes that an "Elon...

item.title: SpaceX Bitcoin Stack Reaches $1.45B as Public Listing Nears
item.description: SpaceX’s IPO filing has turned its bitcoin (CRYPTO: $BTC) holdings into a public-market disclosure, revealing...

item.title: Tesla and SpaceX Are Deepening Their Ties
item.description: SpaceX generated enormous buzz on Wednesday, finally making its S-1 IPO registration statement public. Investors are poring over the details, looking for tidbits that can give them an edge in valuing Elon Musk’s rocket company. One thing not to miss: Tesla and SpaceX have grown very close.

item.title: Tesla Owns Nearly 19 Million Shares of SpaceX: What TSLA Investors Need to Know Before the IPO
item.description: I’ve been digging through the SpaceX S-1 filing for hours, and one number deserves its own spotlight in every TSLA model: Tesla’s beneficial ownership of SpaceX Class A common stock. I’m not going to waste your time with a huge article about this. I thought you needed to know right way, so here a...

item.title: Tesla Has Sold Around $890 Million of EVs and Batteries to SpaceX
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Tesla Inc. has generated around $890 million in revenue from SpaceX and xAI since 2023, a substantial sum underscoring the extent of commingling across Elon Musk’s business empire.Most Read from BloombergSpot the Difference: Putin Gets Trump Treatment From Xi in ChinaIran Threatens...

item.title: Instant View: SpaceX files long awaited IPO, creating a fresh AI play
item.description: Elon Musk's rocket and satellite maker SpaceX filed on Wednesday for its widely awaited initial public offering, which stands to raise the most ever ‌in an initial offering. "It's a little scary to come ​in and say, 'Yeah, let's go invest in ‌a $2 trillion company," hoping that they'll reach the ...

item.title: The Chevy Equinox EV gains a few extras for 2027, including one that drivers will appreciate
item.description: Although the new Bolt is now on sale, GM is still calling the electric Chevy Equinox “America’s most affordable 315+ mile range EV.” For the 2027 model year, GM is addressing at least one of the biggest complaints with the current model. more…

item.title: SpaceX IPO Filing Finally Comes. $28.5 Trillion, SPCX, and More to Know.
item.description: The S-1 IPO registration statement for Elon Musk’s rocket company SpaceX arrived late Wednesday afternoon. Investors can download it here. The IPO is expected to raise a record amount of money, valuing Elon Musk’s company at roughly $2 trillion—enough to turn the world’s richest person into a tri...

item.title: Tesla Inc. (TSLA): Graham Stephan Used to Like This Stock
item.description: We just covered the Graham Stephan Stock Portfolio: Top 11 Stocks and Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) ranks 11th on this list. Graham Stephan famously bought Tesla, Inc.
